response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings nearly two decades of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, and demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative through GISCollective, but falls significantly short of the role's core requirement: recognized, deep expertise in AI strategy. His only AI-specific work is a six-month stint at re:cinq involving MCP tooling and agentic frameworks — useful exposure but nowhere near the demonstrated AI product leadership expected at a Director-level IC position. He has no cloud architecture depth at scale, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, no track record advising strategic customers or partners on AI adoption, and an ongoing career gap reduces confidence in readiness for a high-visibility, externally-facing principal role.
strengths: ~19 years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, formally satisfying the 15-year minimum
Demonstrated founder and entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective, an open-source Geo-Data platform in active production use
Recent hands-on exposure to agentic AI workflows and MCP framework tooling at re:cinq, indicating proactive upskilling in AI infrastructure
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and recent (~6 months of relevant work), with no production-scale AI products or platforms built and no recognized standing in the AI field
No cloud architecture depth or strategic advisory experience; career arc is execution-focused rather than direction-setting or externally influential
No advanced degree in AI or a related field, and title trajectory (Senior/Staff SWE) has never reached Director-level IC scope or organizational influence

key_factors.factor: Years and breadth of engineering experience
Absence of cloud strategy and advisory experience
